author: dirkjaeckel
content: BTW: Major update for my project Myotis (https://github.com/biafra23/myotis#myotis). I implemented a JSON-RPC server and was able to use it with MetaMask (on Android) to create, estimate, send and verify inclusion in a block without any modifications to MetaMask except pointing it to http://localhost:8545 as the RPC service.
